attention1.ptxt: When performing a road test, select a place where there is no traffic or possibility of a traffic accident and be very careful during testing to avoid occurrence of an accident.

s1.ptxt: Connect SUZUKI scan tool to DLC.
Clear DTC according to instructions displayed on scan tool. Refer to scan tool operator’s manual for further details.
Perform “Step 3: Driving Test” in ESP® System Check and DTC Check and confirm that NO DTC is displayed on scan tool.
Disconnect SUZUKI scan tool from DLC after completing the DTC clearance.
